name: smartmem
description: Hierarchical smart memory + harness initializer for Claude Code projects.

plugins.name: smartmem-core
plugins.description: Base memory schema, finalizer agent, hooks, wizard, slash commands.

plugins.name: smartmem-fullstack
plugins.description: Overlay: fullstack web (frontend + backend, sub-CLAUDE.md per layer).

plugins.name: smartmem-business
plugins.description: Overlay: business workflow (process docs, stakeholders, SLAs).
